$comment: v0.1 amended in-place 2026-04-27 (Madhav_M2A_Exec_11) — additive re_validation_status + re_validation_event_id fields per AC.4 Q2 gate. No version bump (additive). Prior amendment: Exec_10 added pass_1_actor.
title: MARSYS-JIS Pattern Register Entry Schema v0.1
description: Schema for pattern register entries in 035_DISCOVERY_LAYER/REGISTERS/PATTERN_REGISTER_v1_0.json. Produced at Madhav_M2A_Exec_9 (2026-04-27) per PHASE_B_PLAN_v1_0.md §B.5.

claim_text.description: Plain-English statement of the pattern (≤300 chars recommended).

mechanism.description: How the signals causally combine — at least one sentence.

signals_referenced.description: MSR signal IDs this pattern draws on.

counter_cases.description: Known counter-examples or conditions under which the pattern does not hold.

classical_basis.description: Citation to classical text (e.g. 'BPHS Ch.23 Sl.7') or 'derivative — emergent pattern'.

alternatives.description: Alternative interpretations (e.g. 7-karaka vs 8-karaka readings). ≥2 required when significance ≥0.7 per P7.

validator_results.description: Per-validator pass/fail results from Claude Pass-2.

confidence.description: Confidence level assigned by Gemini Pass-1 and validated in Pass-2.

significance.description: Significance score (0–1). Gates P7 three-interpretation check at threshold 0.7.

is_forward_looking.description: True if pattern makes a testable time-indexed claim. Triggers Hook 2 prediction logging.

time_indexed_falsifier.description: Required when is_forward_looking is true. Specifies falsifiable prediction window.

ledger_event_ids.description: Two-pass trail: [pattern_proposal event_id, claude_pattern_accept event_id]. Both required.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of pattern acceptance.

created_by_session.description: Session ID that accepted this pattern (e.g. Madhav_M2A_Exec_9).

pass_1_actor.description: Actor that produced Pass-1 (proposal). Per PHASE_B_PLAN §E.5: pattern Pass-1 SHOULD be 'gemini' for Gemini→Claude two-pass. 'claude_self' marks pre-lock Exec_9 deviation (PAT.002–PAT.011). Required for entries created at or after Exec_10.

re_validation_status.description: Result of the Exec_11 AC.4 Gemini Pass-1 re-validation. 'gemini_confirmed': Gemini accepted the pattern. 'gemini_conflict': Gemini rejected; DR entry opened (Q2 soft gate — B.5 close not blocked). 'not_required': pattern was already Gemini Pass-1 validated (PAT.001–004 from Exec_9 batch1; PAT.012–022 from Exec_10 batches 4–6). Added additive in-place at Exec_11.

re_validation_event_id.description: Ledger event ID of the gemini_revalidation_pass1 event (two_pass_events.jsonl). Null for patterns with re_validation_status: not_required. Added additive in-place at Exec_11.
